fixture_mutation_summary: Fixture docs/testing/fixtures/Q/TC-017/stanza_annotation.json is a full Stanza v2.0 JSON object with a minimal deterministic mutation for ENTITY_SPAN_INVALID, ENTITY_TEXT_MISMATCH.
expected_score_rule: Exact score, band, risk, warning/error counts and summary deltas are declared under expected_quality_assertions and MUST be checked without prose interpretation.

expected_quality_assertions.notes: Entity issue expectations are evaluated on entity_quality entry ch1:text:e2; sentence_quality for the same text unit remains valid/high unless separately mutated.

required_assertions: result validates against the public output schema when a JSON result is produced
issue appears at the exact declared scope and id
score, band, risk_level, warning_count, error_count, and summary values equal expected_quality_assertions
unexpected top-level error is absent for succeeded quality issue tests
diagnostic and issue ordering follows the deterministic ordering contract
